content.description:
Field editor for multi-line text using HTML textarea. Used by [generic-editor](item://ffd688d1-93a8-4c4b-b09a-127b249294f5) for fields with `editor: 'textarea'`.

## Options

- `placeholder`: Placeholder text when empty
- `rows`: Number of visible rows (default: 4)
- `readonly`: Makes textarea non-editable

## Use Cases

Best for longer text content that doesn't need rich formatting. For markdown-enabled editing, use a field-view with CodeMirror instead.
